---
title: "Untitled"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r, warning =FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(reshape2)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(asreml)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(metan)
library(writexl)
```

# Indeterminate

```{r}
limabean_indet = read.xlsx("C://Users//joaop//Documents//GitHub//LimaBean//Data//LimaBean_ESALQ_indeterminate.xlsx")
limabean_indet$Block    <- as.factor(limabean_indet$Block)
limabean_indet$Plot    <- as.factor(limabean_indet$Plot)
limabean_indet$Genotype <- as.factor(limabean_indet$Genotype)
limabean_indet$Row<- as.factor(limabean_indet$Row)
limabean_indet$Column <- as.factor(limabean_indet$Column)
limabean_indet$Env    <- as.factor(limabean_indet$Env)
str(limabean_indet)
```

```{r}
lb_indet_gafem = gafem(limabean_indet,
                       gen = Genotype,
                       rep = Block,
                       resp = c(NDF, NDM, PH, PN, GY, OHSW))
```

```{r}
lb_indet_gamem = gamem(limabean_indet,
                       gen = Genotype,
                       rep = Block,
                       resp = c(NDF, NDM, PH, PN, GY, OHSW))
```

```{r}
lb_indet_anova = anova_ind(limabean_indet,
                       gen = Genotype,
                       rep = Block,
                       env = Env,
                       resp = c(NDF, NDM, PH, PN, GY, OHSW))
```

```{r}
GYLRT   = lb_indet_gamem$GY$LRT
OHSWLRT = lb_indet_gamem$OHSW$LRT 
NDFLRT  = lb_indet_gamem$NDF$LRT
NDMLRT  = lb_indet_gamem$NDM$LRT 
PHLRT   = lb_indet_gamem$PH$LRT
PNLRT   = lb_indet_gamem$PN$LRT

LRT = list(
  GY_LRT   = GYLRT,
  OHSW_LRT = OHSWLRT,
  NDF_LRT  = NDFLRT,
  NDM_LRT  = NDMLRT,
  PH_LRT   = PHLRT,
  PN_LRT   = PNLRT
)

library(writexl)
write_xlsx(LRT, "LRT_LBesalqindet.xlsx")
```

```{r}
BLUPgen = list(
  GY_BLUP   = lb_indet_gamem$GY$BLUPgen,
  OHSW_BLUP = lb_indet_gamem$OHSW$BLUPgen,
  NDF_BLUP  = lb_indet_gamem$NDF$BLUPgen,
  NDM_BLUP  = lb_indet_gamem$NDM$BLUPgen,
  PH_BLUP   = lb_indet_gamem$PH$BLUPgen,
  PN_BLUP   = lb_indet_gamem$PN$BLUPgen
)

write_xlsx(BLUPgen, "BLUPgen_LBesalqindet.xlsx")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

ebvMat <- data.frame(
  GEN = lb_indet_gamem$GY$BLUPgen$GEN,
  GY   = lb_indet_gamem$GY$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  OHSW = lb_indet_gamem$OHSW$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  NDF  = lb_indet_gamem$NDF$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  NDM  = lb_indet_gamem$NDM$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  PH   = lb_indet_gamem$PH$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  PN   = lb_indet_gamem$PN$BLUPgen$Predicted
) |>
  column_to_rownames("GEN") |>
  as.matrix()
```

```{r}
trait_units <- c(
  GY   = "kg/ha",
  OHSW = "g",
  PH   = "cm",
  PN   = "number",
  NDF  = "days",
  NDM  = "days"
)

plot_trait_heatmap <- function(x, trait_name) {
  
  df <- x[[trait_name]]$BLUPgen
  
  # ordem correta dos genótipos (baseado no valor)
  df <- df %>%
    arrange(Predicted) %>%
    mutate(
      GEN = factor(GEN, levels = GEN),
      Trait = trait_name
    )
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = GEN, y = Trait, fill = Predicted)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colours = c("orange", "#E37383", "purple"),
      name = bquote(hat(y)~"("~.(trait_units[[trait_name]])~")")
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right",
      panel.grid = element_blank()
    )
}
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

plot_trait_heatmap <- function(x, trait_name) {
  
  # Extrair BLUPs
  df <- as.data.frame(x[[trait_name]]$BLUPgen)
  
  # Ajustar GEN se estiver como rownames
  if (!"GEN" %in% colnames(df)) {
    df$GEN <- rownames(df)
  }
  
  # Renomear coluna de valores para Predicted se não tiver
  if (!"Predicted" %in% colnames(df)) {
    colnames(df)[1] <- "Predicted"
  }
  
  # Ordenar e criar fator para GEN
  df <- df[order(df$Predicted), ]
  df$GEN <- factor(df$GEN, levels = df$GEN)
  df$Trait <- trait_name
  
  # Plot
  ggplot(df, aes(x = GEN, y = Trait, fill = Predicted)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colours = c("orange", "#E37383", "purple"),
      name = bquote(hat(y)~"("~.(trait_units[[trait_name]])~")")
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right",
      panel.grid = element_blank()
    )
}
traits <- c("GY", "OHSW", "PH", "PN", "NDF", "NDM")

BLUP_heatmaps <- lapply(traits, function(trait) {
  plot_trait_heatmap(lb_indet_gamem, trait)
})

library(ggpubr)
blups_heatmap_panel <- ggarrange(
  plotlist = BLUP_heatmaps,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 3,
  labels = LETTERS[1:6],
  font.label = list(size = 10, face = "bold"),
  align = "v"
)
blups_heatmap_panel
```

```{r}
ggsave("blups_heatmap_panel_indet.png", blups_heatmap_panel, dpi = 300,
       height = 12, width = 14)
```

```{r}
corrplot = plot(
  corr_coef(as.data.frame(ebvMat), GY, OHSW, NDF, NDM, PH, PN),
  type = "upper",
  diag = FALSE,
  reorder = TRUE,
  signif = c("stars"),
  p_val = 0.05
)

corrplot
```

```{r}
anova_table <- map_dfr(names(lb_indet_anova), function(trait) {
  
  lb_indet_anova[[trait]]$individual %>%   # <- aqui está o segredo
    mutate(Trait = trait, .before = 1)
  
})

anova_table
```

```{r}
write.xlsx(anova_table, "anova_results.xlsx")
```

```{r}
anova_gafem <- map_dfr(names(lb_indet_gafem), function(trait) {
  lb_indet_gafem[[trait]]$anova %>%
    mutate(Trait = trait, .before = 1)
})

anova_gafem
```

```{r}
details_gafem <- map_dfr(names(lb_indet_gafem), function(trait) {
  lb_indet_gafem[[trait]]$details %>%
    mutate(Trait = trait, .before = 1)
})
```

```{r}
write_xlsx(list(
  anova_gafem = anova_gafem,
  details = details_gafem
), path = "resultslb.xlsx")
```

```{r}
traits <- c("GY", "OHSW", "NDF", "NDM", "PH", "PN")

# Criar matriz de BLUPs
ebvMat <- map(traits, function(trait) {
  
  lb_indet_gamem[[trait]]$BLUPgen %>%
    select(GEN, Predicted) %>%       # pega genótipos e BLUP previsto
    rename(!!trait := Predicted)     # renomeia coluna para o trait atual
  
}) %>%
  reduce(full_join, by = "GEN") %>%   # junta todas as características
  column_to_rownames("GEN") %>%       # define genótipos como rownames
  as.matrix()                         # converte para matriz
```

```{r}
library(AlphaSimR)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)

# --- 1. Filtrar NAs se houver ---
ebvMat <- ebvMat[complete.cases(ebvMat), ]

# --- 2. Matriz de covariância genético dos BLUPs ---
G_ebv <- AlphaSimR::popVar(ebvMat)
G_ebv

# --- 3. Ganhos desejados ---
desiredGain <- c(
  GY   =  2,
  OHSW =  1,
  NDF  = -1,
  NDM  = -1,
  PH   =  0,
  PN   =  1
)
desiredGain <- desiredGain / sqrt(sum(desiredGain^2))
sum(desiredGain^2) # deve ser 1

# --- 4. Coeficientes iniciais ---
b_ebv <- solve(G_ebv) %*% desiredGain
b_ebv

# --- 5. Função de otimização do Desire Index ---
gainDiff <- function(ebvMat, b_ebv, dGain, nSel){ 
  take <- order(ebvMat %*% b_ebv, decreasing = TRUE)[1:nSel]
  mu_Sel <- colMeans(ebvMat[take, ])
  resp   <- mu_Sel - colMeans(ebvMat)
  resp   <- resp / sqrt(sum(resp^2))
  sum((resp - dGain)^2)
}

# --- 6. Número de genótipos selecionados ---
nSel <- 3

# --- 7. Otimização ---
opt <- optim(
  par     = b_ebv,
  fn      = gainDiff,
  ebvMat  = ebvMat,
  dGain   = desiredGain,
  nSel    = nSel
)
opt_weights <- opt$par
opt_weights

# --- 8. Calcular Desire Index para todos os genótipos ---
DesireIndex <- ebvMat %*% opt_weights
DesireIndex <- data.frame(
  GEN = rownames(ebvMat),
  DesireIndex = as.numeric(DesireIndex)
) %>%
  arrange(desc(DesireIndex))

# --- 9. Salvar ranking em Excel ---
write.xlsx(DesireIndex, "DesireIndex.xlsx")

# --- 10. Seleção dos top nSel genótipos ---
selected <- DesireIndex[1:nSel, ]
selected

# --- 11. Ganho esperado vs alcançado ---
sel_mat <- ebvMat[selected$GEN, ]
expResp <- colMeans(sel_mat) - colMeans(ebvMat)
scaleExpResp <- expResp / sqrt(sum(expResp^2))

df_vec <- data.frame(
  Trait = names(desiredGain),
  Desired  = desiredGain,
  Achieved = scaleExpResp
)

# --- 12. Plot dos ganhos desejados vs alcançados ---
ggplot(df_vec, aes(x = Desired, y = Achieved)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "purple") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Trait), nudge_x = 0.05, size = 5, color = "orange") +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(-1,1), ylim = c(-1,1)) +
  labs(x = "Desired Gain", y = "Achieved Gain") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

# --- 13. Plot circular do Desire Index ---
di_df <- DesireIndex %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(DesireIndex)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    GEN = factor(GEN, levels = GEN),
    Selected = ifelse(GEN %in% selected$GEN, "Selected", "Not selected")
  )

# Plot circular
desiredgainplot <- ggplot(di_df, aes(x = GEN, y = DesireIndex, fill = Selected)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9, color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  coord_polar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Selected" = "#6A1B9A", "Not selected" = "orange")) +
  labs(fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# Exibir o plot
desiredgainplot
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Ordenar os genótipos por Desire Index
di_df <- di_df %>%
  dplyr::arrange(DesireIndex) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(GEN = factor(GEN, levels = GEN))  # mantém a ordem para o eixo y

# Plot lollipop
desiredgainplot2 = ggplot(di_df, aes(x = DesireIndex, y = GEN, color = Selected)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = DesireIndex, y = GEN, yend = GEN), size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 4, fill = "white") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Selected" = "#6A1B9A", "Not selected" = "orange")) +
  labs(
    x = "Desire Index",
    y = "Genotype",
    title = "Lollipop Plot - Desire Index",
    color = "Selection"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
desiredgainplot2
```

```{r}
ggsave("desiredgainplot_indet.png",
       plot = desiredgainplot,
       dpi = 300,
       width = 10,
       height = 12)
ggsave("desiredgainplot2_indet.png",
       plot = desiredgainplot2,
       dpi = 300,
       width = 10,
       height = 12)
```

# Determinate

```{r}
limabean_det = read.xlsx("C://Users//joaop//Documents//GitHub//LimaBean//Data//LimaBean_ESALQ_determinate.xlsx")
limabean_det$Block    <- as.factor(limabean_det$Block)
limabean_det$Plot    <- as.factor(limabean_det$Plot)
limabean_det$Genotype <- as.factor(limabean_det$Genotype)
limabean_det$Row<- as.factor(limabean_det$Row)
limabean_det$Column <- as.factor(limabean_det$Column)
limabean_det$Env    <- as.factor(limabean_det$Env)
str(limabean_det)
```

```{r}
lb_det_gafem = gafem(limabean_det,
                       gen = Genotype,
                       rep = Block,
                       resp = c(NDF, NDM, PH, PN, GY, OHSW))
```

```{r}
lb_det_gamem = gamem(limabean_det,
                       gen = Genotype,
                       rep = Block,
                       resp = c(NDF, NDM, PH, PN, GY, OHSW))
```

```{r}
lb_det_anova = anova_ind(limabean_det,
                       gen = Genotype,
                       rep = Block,
                       env = Env,
                       resp = c(NDF, NDM, PH, PN, GY, OHSW))
```

```{r}
GYLRT   = lb_det_gamem$GY$LRT
OHSWLRT = lb_det_gamem$OHSW$LRT 
NDFLRT  = lb_det_gamem$NDF$LRT
NDMLRT  = lb_det_gamem$NDM$LRT 
PHLRT   = lb_det_gamem$PH$LRT
PNLRT   = lb_det_gamem$PN$LRT

LRT = list(
  GY_LRT   = GYLRT,
  OHSW_LRT = OHSWLRT,
  NDF_LRT  = NDFLRT,
  NDM_LRT  = NDMLRT,
  PH_LRT   = PHLRT,
  PN_LRT   = PNLRT
)

library(writexl)
write_xlsx(LRT, "LRT_LBesalqdet.xlsx")
```

```{r}
BLUPgen = list(
  GY_BLUP   = lb_det_gamem$GY$BLUPgen,
  OHSW_BLUP = lb_det_gamem$OHSW$BLUPgen,
  NDF_BLUP  = lb_det_gamem$NDF$BLUPgen,
  NDM_BLUP  = lb_det_gamem$NDM$BLUPgen,
  PH_BLUP   = lb_det_gamem$PH$BLUPgen,
  PN_BLUP   = lb_det_gamem$PN$BLUPgen
)

write_xlsx(BLUPgen, "BLUPgen_LBesalqdet.xlsx")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

ebvMat <- data.frame(
  GEN = lb_det_gamem$GY$BLUPgen$GEN,
  GY   = lb_det_gamem$GY$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  OHSW = lb_det_gamem$OHSW$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  NDF  = lb_det_gamem$NDF$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  NDM  = lb_det_gamem$NDM$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  PH   = lb_det_gamem$PH$BLUPgen$Predicted,
  PN   = lb_det_gamem$PN$BLUPgen$Predicted
) |>
  column_to_rownames("GEN") |>
  as.matrix()
```

```{r}
trait_units <- c(
  GY   = "kg/ha",
  OHSW = "g",
  PH   = "cm",
  PN   = "number",
  NDF  = "days",
  NDM  = "days"
)

plot_trait_heatmap <- function(x, trait_name) {
  
  df <- x[[trait_name]]$BLUPgen
  
  # ordem correta dos genótipos (baseado no valor)
  df <- df %>%
    arrange(Predicted) %>%
    mutate(
      GEN = factor(GEN, levels = GEN),
      Trait = trait_name
    )
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = GEN, y = Trait, fill = Predicted)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colours = c("orange", "#E37383", "purple"),
      name = bquote(hat(y)~"("~.(trait_units[[trait_name]])~")")
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right",
      panel.grid = element_blank()
    )
}
```

```{r}
plot_trait_heatmap <- function(x, trait_name) {
  
  # Extrair BLUPs
  df <- x[[trait_name]]$BLUPgen
  
  # Converter para data.frame
  df <- as.data.frame(df)
  
  # Se os nomes dos genótipos estão como rownames
  if (!"GEN" %in% colnames(df)) {
    df$GEN <- rownames(df)
  }
  
  # Renomear primeira coluna para Predicted
  if (!"Predicted" %in% colnames(df)) {
    colnames(df)[1] <- "Predicted"
  }
  
  # Remover colunas duplicadas (se houver)
  df <- df[, !duplicated(colnames(df))]
  
  # Ordenar e transformar GEN em fator
  df <- df[order(df$Predicted), ]
  df$GEN <- factor(df$GEN, levels = df$GEN)
  df$Trait <- trait_name
  
  # Criar heatmap
  ggplot(df, aes(x = GEN, y = Trait, fill = Predicted)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colours = c("orange", "#E37383", "purple"),
      name = bquote(hat(y)~"("~.(trait_units[[trait_name]])~")")
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right",
      panel.grid = element_blank()
    )
}
```

```{r}
BLUP_heatmaps <- lapply(traits, function(trait) {
  plot_trait_heatmap(lb_det_gamem, trait)
})

blups_heatmap_panel <- ggarrange(
  plotlist = BLUP_heatmaps,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 3,
  labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"),
  font.label = list(size = 10, face = "bold"),
  align = "v"
)

blups_heatmap_panel
```

```{r}
ggsave("blups_heatmap_panel_det.png", blups_heatmap_panel, dpi = 300,
       height = 12, width = 14)
```

```{r}
corrplot = plot(
  corr_coef(as.data.frame(ebvMat), GY, OHSW, NDF, NDM, PH, PN),
  type = "upper",
  diag = FALSE,
  reorder = TRUE,
  signif = c("stars"),
  p_val = 0.05
)

corrplot
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(writexl)

# ------------------------------
# 1. Tabela ANOVA individual (anova_ind)
# ------------------------------
anova_table <- map_dfr(names(lb_det_anova), function(trait) {
  df <- as.data.frame(lb_det_anova[[trait]]$individual)
  cbind(Trait = trait, df)
})

# Exportar
write_xlsx(anova_table, "ANOVA_individual_LBesalqdet.xlsx")

# ------------------------------
# 2. Tabela ANOVA one-way (gafem)
# ------------------------------
anova_gafem <- map_dfr(names(lb_det_gafem), function(trait) {
  df <- as.data.frame(lb_det_gafem[[trait]]$anova)
  cbind(Trait = trait, df)
})

write_xlsx(anova_gafem, "ANOVA_gafem_LBesalqdet.xlsx")

# ------------------------------
# 3. Detalhes do modelo (gafem)
# ------------------------------
details_gafem <- map_dfr(names(lb_det_gafem), function(trait) {
  df <- as.data.frame(lb_det_gafem[[trait]]$details)
  cbind(Trait = trait, df)
})

write_xlsx(details_gafem, "Details_gafem_LBesalqdet.xlsx")

# ------------------------------
# 4. LRT do gamem
# ------------------------------
LRT_table <- map_dfr(names(lb_det_gamem), function(trait) {
  df <- as.data.frame(lb_det_gamem[[trait]]$LRT)
  cbind(Trait = trait, df)
})

write_xlsx(LRT_table, "LRT_gamem_LBesalqdet.xlsx")

# ------------------------------
# 5. BLUPs do gamem
# ------------------------------
BLUP_table <- map_dfr(names(lb_det_gamem), function(trait) {
  df <- as.data.frame(lb_det_gamem[[trait]]$BLUPgen)
  
  # Ajusta coluna GEN caso esteja como rownames
  if (!"GEN" %in% colnames(df)) {
    df$GEN <- rownames(df)
  }
  
  # Renomeia primeira coluna para Predicted se necessário
  if (!"Predicted" %in% colnames(df)) {
    colnames(df)[1] <- "Predicted"
  }
  
  cbind(Trait = trait, df)
})

write_xlsx(BLUP_table, "BLUPgen_gamem_LBesalqdet.xlsx")
```

```{r}
traits <- c("GY", "OHSW", "NDF", "NDM", "PH", "PN")

# Criar matriz de BLUPs
ebvMat <- map(traits, function(trait) {
  
  lb_det_gamem[[trait]]$BLUPgen %>%
    select(GEN, Predicted) %>%       
    rename(!!trait := Predicted)     
  
}) %>%
  reduce(full_join, by = "GEN") %>%   
  column_to_rownames("GEN") %>%       
  as.matrix()                         
```

```{r}
library(AlphaSimR)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)

# --- 1. Filtrar NAs se houver ---
ebvMat <- ebvMat[complete.cases(ebvMat), ]

# --- 2. Matriz de covariância genético dos BLUPs ---
G_ebv <- AlphaSimR::popVar(ebvMat)
G_ebv

# --- 3. Ganhos desejados ---
desiredGain <- c(
  GY   =  2,
  OHSW =  1,
  NDF  = -1,
  NDM  = -1,
  PH   =  0,
  PN   =  1
)
desiredGain <- desiredGain / sqrt(sum(desiredGain^2))
sum(desiredGain^2) # deve ser 1

# --- 4. Coeficientes iniciais ---
b_ebv <- solve(G_ebv) %*% desiredGain
b_ebv

# --- 5. Função de otimização do Desire Index ---
gainDiff <- function(ebvMat, b_ebv, dGain, nSel){ 
  take <- order(ebvMat %*% b_ebv, decreasing = TRUE)[1:nSel]
  mu_Sel <- colMeans(ebvMat[take, ])
  resp   <- mu_Sel - colMeans(ebvMat)
  resp   <- resp / sqrt(sum(resp^2))
  sum((resp - dGain)^2)
}

# --- 6. Número de genótipos selecionados ---
nSel <- 3

# --- 7. Otimização ---
opt <- optim(
  par     = b_ebv,
  fn      = gainDiff,
  ebvMat  = ebvMat,
  dGain   = desiredGain,
  nSel    = nSel
)
opt_weights <- opt$par
opt_weights

# --- 8. Calcular Desire Index para todos os genótipos ---
DesireIndex <- ebvMat %*% opt_weights
DesireIndex <- data.frame(
  GEN = rownames(ebvMat),
  DesireIndex = as.numeric(DesireIndex)
) %>%
  arrange(desc(DesireIndex))

# --- 9. Salvar ranking em Excel ---
write.xlsx(DesireIndex, "DesireIndex.xlsx")

# --- 10. Seleção dos top nSel genótipos ---
selected <- DesireIndex[1:nSel, ]
selected

# --- 11. Ganho esperado vs alcançado ---
sel_mat <- ebvMat[selected$GEN, ]
expResp <- colMeans(sel_mat) - colMeans(ebvMat)
scaleExpResp <- expResp / sqrt(sum(expResp^2))

df_vec <- data.frame(
  Trait = names(desiredGain),
  Desired  = desiredGain,
  Achieved = scaleExpResp
)

ggplot(df_vec, aes(x = Desired, y = Achieved)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "purple") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Trait), nudge_x = 0.05, size = 5, color = "orange") +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(-1,1), ylim = c(-1,1)) +
  labs(x = "Desired Gain", y = "Achieved Gain") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

di_df <- DesireIndex %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(DesireIndex)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    GEN = factor(GEN, levels = GEN),
    Selected = ifelse(GEN %in% selected$GEN, "Selected", "Not selected")
  )

desiredgainplot_det <- ggplot(di_df, aes(x = GEN, y = DesireIndex, fill = Selected)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9, color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  coord_polar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Selected" = "#6A1B9A", "Not selected" = "orange")) +
  labs(fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

desiredgainplot_det
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

di_df <- di_df %>%
  dplyr::arrange(DesireIndex) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(GEN = factor(GEN, levels = GEN))  # mantém a ordem para o eixo y

desiredgainplot2_det = ggplot(di_df, aes(x = DesireIndex, y = GEN, color = Selected)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = DesireIndex, y = GEN, yend = GEN), size = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 4, fill = "white") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Selected" = "#6A1B9A", "Not selected" = "orange")) +
  labs(
    x = "Desire Index",
    y = "Genotype",
    title = "Lollipop Plot - Desire Index",
    color = "Selection"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
desiredgainplot2_det
```

```{r}
ggsave("desiredgainplot_det.png",
       plot = desiredgainplot_det,
       dpi = 300,
       width = 10,
       height = 12)
ggsave("desiredgainplot2_det.png",
       plot = desiredgainplot2_det,
       dpi = 300,
       width = 10,
       height = 12)
```
